Frequently Asked Questions

How do I apply for a military/paramilitary service?
Simply click on the service you want (e.g. Army Application), fill in the form with your details, and submit. Our team will contact you within hours to guide you through the process.
How long does NIN correction take?
NIN corrections typically take 3–7 working days depending on NIMC's processing time. We will keep you updated throughout the process.
What documents do I need for CAC registration?
You will need a valid means of ID, a proposed business name, business address, and nature of business. Fill the form and our team will provide a full checklist.
How do I pay for services?
Payment details will be provided after you submit your service request form. We accept bank transfers and mobile payment options.
Can I get a graphic design done the same day?
Yes! Simple graphic design jobs can be completed same day. Complex branding or web design projects may take 2–5 business days.
How do I contact you for urgent requests?
For urgent requests, please use the WhatsApp button at the bottom right of the page or call us directly. We respond quickly to all messages.
